text: 卧槽，原来 yetong 开源的是 Prompt，比一坨 vibe 后的代码有价值多了，大大的点个赞👍 https://t.co/oVNLroJBVP

There’s a crazy cool new AI feature in Google Maps.

“Ask Maps” uses Gemini to answer location-based questions in natural language. 

It’s like a personal researcher that helps you find places and plan your day.

I’ve been using it to search by vibe (and find parking) 👇 https://t.co/OxpmMB620D
